query:
INSERT INTO product_batches (batchCode, productId, customerId, customRequirements, fobSellingPrice, productionStatus, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT 'SB-001-B001', p.id, 1, 'Custom gray fabric with reinforced stitching, custom packaging with company logo', 270.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'SB-001-GRY'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'SB-001-B002', p.id, 3, 'Light gray fabric upgrade, additional cushion padding, white glove delivery', 295.00, 'in_progress', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'SB-001-GRY'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'SB-001-B003', p.id, 5, 'Standard version with expedited production timeline', 280.00, 'pending', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'SB-001-GRY'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'SB-001-B004', p.id, 8, 'Bulk order discount applied, standard packaging', 255.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'SB-001-GRY'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'SB-002-B001', p.id, 2, 'Navy blue velvet with gold leg finish upgrade', 440.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'SB-002-NVY'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'SB-002-B002', p.id, 4, 'Custom dimensions: 220cm length instead of 210cm', 455.00, 'in_progress', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'SB-002-NVY'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'SB-002-B003', p.id, 7, 'Standard version, premium packaging', 425.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'SB-002-NVY'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'SB-002-B004', p.id, 10, 'Bulk order 50+ units, volume discount', 385.00, 'pending', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'SB-002-NVY'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'SB-002-B005', p.id, 12, 'Custom fabric color: midnight blue', 435.00, 'in_progress', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'SB-002-NVY';
